THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT MAHLER, BRIGITTA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $5,703.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,703.45, JUDGMT FOR DEFT MAHLER IF DEFT PAYS PLTFS CRAWFORD $1,676.82 ON OR BEFORE 5:00 PM 8/2/96, EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. IF DEFT MAHLER DOES NOT PAY $1,676.82 AS AGREED UPON, JUDGMT FOR THE PLTFS & AGAINST DEFT FOR POSS. OF THE PREM. FOR $1,676.82 RENTS/DAM. & COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
